title: Japan Backs Hydrogen-Powered Commercial Vehicles with Major Subsidies
content: To accelerate the adoption of hydrogen fuel cell vehicles, the Japanese government is investing heavily in subsidies. The Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) plans to provide hydrogen refueling incentives for commercial vehicles, targeting six administrative regions with high demand.  The new subsidies will cover up to three-quarters of the fuel price differenceâ€”approximately Â¥700 per kilogram (about USD $4.83).
author: Analysts Account
